agentCard.name: Orchestrator Agent
agentCard.description: Parent agent that delegates to coding and research sub-agents via the a2a-mcp-skillmap bridge. The LLM sees coding__review, coding__explain, research__search, and research__summarize as ordinary MCP tools.

skills.name: Multi-Agent Orchestrator
skills.description: Routes requests to the coding or research sub-agent and synthesizes their responses.
